meta.title: DEF CON 31 War Stories - Designing RFID Implants  Flipping the Bird Opens Doors - Miana Ella Windall
meta.description: RFID implants are basically RFID credentials that can be installed under your skin. When I discovered there was nothing on the market that worked with my employers badging system I decided that I would just have to make my own. This talk will cover the basics of RFID implants, my journey to design my own implant despite having no electronics experience, and some of the future implications of this technology.
